title: puck: silence non-native unused state warnings
description: Why this exists: while validating project-LICHEN-9nrr.22, west build -b t_echo/nrf52840 lichen/apps/puck now links, but still emits pre-existing warnings when CONFIG_LICHEN_NATIVE is disabled: s_iid is defined but not used, and last_info_ms is unused in main(). What needs to be done: gate or move these variables so non-native builds are warning-clean without changing native status/reporting behavior. Verify at least t_echo/nrf52840 puck build and a native-enabled puck build or equivalent config. As a code-generation/fix Bead, run two review passes before closing.
close_reason: Gated puck native-only state so non-native builds do not define unused s_iid or last_info_ms while preserving the CONFIG_LICHEN_NATIVE node-info/reporting path. Tests/builds: west build -b t_echo/nrf52840 lichen/apps/puck -d build/puck_t_echo_nrf52840 --pristine=always passed; west build -b t1000_e/nrf52840 lichen/apps/puck -d build/puck_t1000_e_nrf52840 --pristine=always passed; git diff --check passed. Review pass 1: no findings; verified the non-native T-Echo config has CONFIG_LICHEN_NATIVE disabled and the unused symbols are inside IS_ENABLED(CONFIG_LICHEN_NATIVE). Review pass 2: no findings in scope; filed project-LICHEN-9nrr.33 for unrelated T1000-E USB default VID/PID warnings seen during native-enabled validation.
